reasoning: This substance is lambda-cyhalothrin (or a related mixture), a synthetic pyrethroid insecticide composed of a cyclopropanecarboxylate ester with a cyano-3-phenoxybenzyl alcohol moiety and a trifluoromethyl/chloro-substituted propenyl group, fitting the pyrethroid class. Pyrethroids are classified under Fatty Acyls in ChemOnt due to their cyclopropane carboxylate ester structure.
